productName: Refine Infused HASH Joint - Baby Yo-Duh x Galactic Runtz
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Baby Yo-Duh x Galactic Runtz and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of skunk, sweet, and diesel, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
